name: Chicken Cacciatora
recipeIngredient: 1 2-1/2 to 3 pound frying chicken, cut up
4 cups crushed canned Italian plum tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add chicken pieces and brown on all sides, about 10 minutes. Drain the chicken on paper towels and set aside. Remove all but 1 tablespoon of oil from the pan.
3. Add peppers, mushrooms, and onions to the pan. Sauté for about 5 minutes on medium heat.
4. Add wine and stir for 1 minute.
5. Stir in broth and tomatoes. Add oregano and red pepper flakes; bring to a boil.
6. Return chicken to the pot and simmer, uncovered, on medium-high heat for about 30 minutes until the chicken is tender and the sauce has slightly thickened.
7. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper to taste. Serve hot.
